description_long: This is a compact, rectangular toaster with a matte black exterior and a simple, utilitarian design. The front face features a central lever for lowering bread, a round black knob likely for adjusting browning settings, and a small red button, possibly for canceling the toasting cycle. The top surface has two parallel slots for inserting bread, each with visible internal metal grates. The sides and back are plain, with no visible branding or additional features, and the toaster stands on four small, round feet. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some plastic components for the controls and feet. No power cord or crumb tray is visible in these views.
description: A matte black, rectangular toaster with two top slots, a central lever, and control knobs on the front. The design is simple and modern, with visible metal and plastic parts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central lever, a round black knob, a small red button, and the two top slots.
description_view_1: Left side view, plain and featureless except for the protruding ends of the lever and knob.
description_view_2: Rear view, completely plain with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view, also plain with only the end of the lever visible.
attribute_control_knobs: One round black knob on the lower right front, no visible markings or labels.
attribute_toast_slots: Two parallel rectangular slots on the top, evenly spaced, sized for standard bread slices.
